channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Samkelo Mokhine discusses how the xenophobia label may affect debate on immigration and governance in South Africa
item.description: In this opinion piece, Samkelo Mokhine reflects on South Africa’s ongoing and highly sensitive debate around immigration and the use of the term “xenophobia” in public discourse. The article is framed...

item.title: Nigeria Customs seals tanker at Tin Can Island over document irregularities and unauthorised discharge
item.description: The Tin-Can Island Port Command of the Nigeria Customs Service (NCS) has sealed a vessel, MT NY Maria, following alleged documentation irregularities and unauthorised discharge of Premium Motor Spirit...

item.title: Economist flags risks and structural concerns in Philippines’ participation in Pax Silica semiconductor alliance
item.description: The article discusses the Philippines’ entry into Pax Silica, a US-led alliance aimed at strengthening supply chains for artificial intelligence, semiconductors, and critical minerals. While the agree...

item.title: Epstein survivors hesitant to engage with UK police investigating Andrew, lawyer says
item.description: An American lawyer representing hundreds of Jeffrey Epstein victims has said that several of his clients are unwilling to speak to UK authorities about allegations involving Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor...

item.title: NDC to officially confirm Peter Obi as sole presidential candidate during nationwide primaries
item.description: The Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) is expected to formally ratify former Anambra State Governor, Peter Obi, as its presidential candidate during its nationwide primaries scheduled for Friday, May 2...

item.title: Marcos denies allegation of push for no elections in 2028, rebukes misinformation from sister Imee
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has firmly denied allegations made by his sister, Senator Imee Marcos, claiming that he is supposedly pushing for a “no-election” scenario in 2028. Speaking to reporters...

item.title: President Marcos acknowledges Japanese technical support in managing Navotas landfill fire
item.description: President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. expressed his gratitude to the Japanese government for their assistance in handling the large fire at the Navotas Sanitary Landfill, which started on April 10...

item.title: The rise of looksmaxxing and the culture of extreme self-optimisation in online masculinity spaces
item.description: The article examines the growing online trend known as “looksmaxxing”, a subculture primarily associated with young men seeking to optimise their physical appearance. This ranges from relatively conve...

item.title: Starr Healer reflects on love, loneliness and self-discovery ahead of new collaboration with Nomfundo Moh
item.description: Afro-soul newcomer Starr Healer opens up in a candid interview about her personal journey, identity, and emotional growth as she steps further into the South African music industry. Speaking ahead of ...

item.title: Rivers VIO and AUPCTRE discuss collaboration and staff welfare in Rivers State
item.description: The Rivers State Road Traffic and Vehicle Inspection Officers (VIO) have held a courtesy and interactive meeting with the leadership of the Amalgamated Union of Public Corporations, Civil Service Tech...

item.title: Column criticises Canadian media coverage of torn missing-person posters and alleged omission of antisemitism context
item.description: In this opinion column, Michael Higgins argues that major Canadian news organisations, including the CBC and The Canadian Press, failed to fully report the circumstances surrounding the repeated teari...

item.title: Groundwater Depletion in South Africa Threatens Irrigation and Supply
item.description: Recent research shows that South Africa relies heavily on groundwater, drawing roughly two-thirds of its irrigation water from underground sources. A global study led by Dr Feifei Cao and the Internat...

item.title: Ice Prince Discusses Cannabis Use, Financial Comfort, and Health Journey
item.description: Nigerian rapper Panshak Zamani, known professionally as Ice Prince, revealed in a recent podcast appearance that he spends approximately N60,000 daily on cannabis. During the Nevon podcast hosted by R...

item.title: Police arrest protesters during Victoria Park Olympic stadium site stand-off in Brisbane
item.description: Police and Brisbane City Council officers have moved to dismantle First Nations protest camps at Victoria Park in Brisbane, resulting in at least two arrests during a tense stand-off. The camps were e...

item.title: Argentina names 26-man World Cup squad with Lionel Messi as captain
item.description: Argentina has officially revealed its final 26-player squad for the FIFA World Cup, with Lionel Messi once again taking the lead role as captain and key figure of the team. The announcement confirms a...

item.title: Tshwane issues emergency water response as Rand Water maintenance threatens widespread supply disruptions
item.description: The City of Tshwane has activated an emergency response plan ahead of a major planned maintenance shutdown by Rand Water and Eskom, which is expected to significantly affect water supply across parts ...

item.title: Fame Academy Contestants: Life After the Show and Career Highlights
item.description: Fame Academy, a British talent show from over two decades ago, launched the careers of several notable singers, though its run was brief due to low ratings. David Sneddon, winner of the first series, ...

item.title: Analysis of Australia’s Rich List: wealth trends, property dominance and billionaire comparisons
item.description: This article examines the structure and trends behind Australia’s Rich List using a data-driven approach presented through seven charts. It focuses on how wealth is distributed among Australia’s riche...

item.title: Trump expresses indifference to midterms while focusing on Iran, raising concerns among Republicans
item.description: President Donald Trump made controversial remarks during a recent White House cabinet meeting, stating that he 'doesn't care about the midterms' and is instead prioritizing preventing Iran from develo...

item.title: JSC opens applications for 33 tribunal and senior judiciary-related positions
item.description: The Judicial Service Commission (JSC) of Kenya has advertised 33 job vacancies targeting qualified Kenyan professionals for both middle and senior-level roles within the Judiciary and associated tribu...
